meaning: n.同情者,支持者,同感者,同意者
examples: Sometimes a sympathizer is one step away from a lover.
He's proposing that the legislation authored by Senator McConnell -- not a noted Obama sympathizer -- be taken up again and adopted.
Women of Zimbabwe Arise director Jenni Williams said the attorney general, who was appointed by Mugabe last month, is a government sympathizer.
After all, not every single German in World War II was a Nazi sympathizer, and not every sports parent is obsessed with a scholarship.
